subject: Fwd: 58th Presidential Inauguration Details
body:
Is this worth attending 

Sent from my iPhone

Begin forwarded message:

> From: Tom Barrack <TB@58PIC2017.org>
> Date: January 5, 2017 at 2:55:43 AM GMT+4
> To: Tom Barrack <TB@58PIC2017.org>
> Subject: 58th Presidential Inauguration Details
> 
> Greetings,
> 
> It is my great privilege and honor to invite you, as my guest, to the 58th Presidential Inauguration.  Attached you will find information regarding the schedule of events, accommodation details, and important contact information.  
> 
> This will be the most epic inauguration in recent history!
> 
> Sincerely,
> Thomas J. Barrack, Jr.
> Chairman of the Presidential Inaugural Committee 
> 
>
body_html:
Is this worth attending 

Sent from my iPhone

Begin forwarded message:

From: Tom Barrack <TB@58PIC2017.org>
Date: January 5, 2017 at 2:55:43 AM GMT+4
To: Tom Barrack <TB@58PIC2017.org>
Subject: 58th Presidential Inauguration Details

Greetings,

It is my great privilege and honor to invite you, as my guest, to the 58th Presidential Inauguration.  Attached you will find information regarding the schedule of events, accommodation details, and important contact information.  

This will be the most epic inauguration in recent history!

Sincerely,
Thomas J. Barrack, Jr.
Chairman of the Presidential Inaugural Committee
